_comment: Mirrors src/ui/panels.rs constants. Drift is caught by tests/chassis_layout_check.rs.

vents._comment: Per rack ear: 8 slots, slot_w x slot_h centered horizontally in the ear, starting at y=ear_top+35, spacing 44 px.

bezels._comment: OUTPUT and COMP display bezels. Coords are the lit-area rect; bezel extends 4 px beyond on all sides per widgets.rs:75.

grooves._comment: Horizontal section dividers — y values computed from editor.rs/panels.rs layout flow. groove[0] above master row; subsequent above each knob row.

edge_band._comment: Top + bottom 12-px bands recessed slightly so the seam casts a shadow in the bake.

material._comment: Direction shifted 2026-04-28 after user reference image (refs/reference_hammertone_finish.png) — hammertone / textured-spray finish, NOT smooth powder-coat. Real micro-displacement on the geometry (Voronoi/noise driving normal+displacement) gives the visible stipple grain. Slight warm/bronze tint, moderate metallic, broad soft specular highlights from oblique key light. Iter 3 wires this fully; iter 0/1/2 ignore most fields.
material._base_color_note: ≈ #1B1817 sRGB — subtle warm/bronze tint vs the previous neutral #131313. Stays close to BG_PANEL so canvas-edge fallback still matches.
material._coat_note: Hammertone finishes don't have a clear topcoat — leave coat at zero so the spec reads as paint, not lacquer.

displacement._scale_note: Smaller scale = denser stipple. 110 maps to roughly the cell density visible in the reference image.

roughness_modulation._amount_note: Roughness +/- 0.18 along the Voronoi cells gives the dark/bright micro-flake variation in the reference.

lights._comment: Iteration 0 uses only `key`. Iteration 3 adds fill + rim.
